rationale: The page is a full-page advertisement for Vision IAS coaching services. It highlights their past achievements (toppers from 2013-2024) and promotes upcoming Foundation Courses for General Studies in both English and Hindi. It contains no educational content suitable for generating questions.
cleanedText:
